rows.notes: Clear printed year at top of page, no monetary columns associated.
Clearly underlined title for the account section; no amounts on this header line.
Right-hand small script 'brought up' aligns with the first column total at top: 1159 pounds, 4s, 4d. Numerals are clear and well aligned with ruling lines.
Description reads 'Est e Charges' (handwritten). Amount columns clearly show 23 | 7 | 6; digits legible and within valid ranges.
Description 'Poor Rate' is clear. Amount 4.10.0 is unambiguous in the pounds/shillings/pence columns.
Entry 'Domus Battels' aligns with 48|11|11. Pence '11' is readable though the tail of the 1s slightly thinner; still unambiguous.
Description 'Baker' clear. Amount 4.10.0 is well aligned and legible.

Description reads like 'Symms' with a long note in the center column ('Bill - 73 Queen St'). Pounds read as '306' (hundreds digit slightly narrower but consistent with alignment). Shillings 12 and pence 3 are aligned; 12 shillings valid.
Name 'Whitehead' readable. Amount columns read 4 | 18 | 11; shillings '18' and pence '11' are clear though ink is slightly light on the pence digit.
Description 'Osborne' clear. Amount 10.18.0 is well aligned; digits are legible.
Entry 'Grove' is legible. Amount 5|11|0 clearly written and within valid ranges.
'Furniture' entry aligns with 49.0.0; zeros are clearly marked for shillings and pence.
Reads 'Morton new Cottage' (could be 'Merton') — amount 100.0.0 is very clear and aligned.
Name 'Walsh' readable. Amount columns show 24|8|1; pence '1' is small but legible.
Description reads 'Bamptn Cottage sale yf. Street' (handwriting contracted). Amount 7|8|0 visible though the place-name is abbreviated and a little faded.
Entry 'Rowell' clear; amount 18.5.4 aligned and legible.

Description is difficult to read (looks like 'kid vol. Church Rate Dixon'); I transcribed literally as seen. Amount reads 2|10|0 but the handwriting on the description is uncertain; amount alignment is clearer than wording.
'Income Tax' is legible. Amount 47.15.3 clearly falls into columns and digits are distinct.
Second 'Domus Battels' line present; amount 31|18|4 readable though the pence digit is slightly faint.
Description reads as 'Imp. Cole' (abbreviation unclear). Amount 80.14.0 is aligned but the '14' shillings has a small flourish; still within valid range.
Another 'Poor Rate' entry; amount 5|5|0 clearly written.
Description reads like 'Percentages' or 'Percentags' — amount 41.4.2 clear and within valid ranges.
A second 'Est-Charges' entry; 23|7|6 is aligned with earlier Est Charges format and digits are legible.
